name: Green Tomato Relish by Mavis Vawter
recipeInstructions:
1. After vegetables are chopped, drain off liquid and discard.
2. Combine ingredients in a Dutch oven, bring to a boil and boil for 20 minutes.
3. Pour into hot sterilized pint jars, leaving 1/2-inch at the top of the jar.
4. Put on hot lids and rings.
5. Process for 10 minutes in boiling water bath.
